title: Ephemerantha denigrata
taxonomy: Ephemerantha denigrata belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. Within the Orchidaceae family, Ephemerantha denigrata is classified as a member of the subfamily Vanilloideae. It is further grouped into the genus Ephemerantha, a group of terrestrial orchids native to the tropical regions of the Americas. The species Ephemerantha denigrata is specifically known for its unique and distinctive features. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics, such as its growth habit, leaf structure, and flower morphology.
